description: Convert natural language descriptions to LangGraph workflow configurations

evals.name: simple_sequential_search_report
evals.prompt: 把以下描述转成langgraph工作流配置：首先搜索相关资料，然后整理成报告，最后输出结果。
evals.expected_output: A valid LangGraph configuration with 3 nodes (资料搜索, 报告整理, 结果输出) connected sequentially, with proper state schemas

assertions.text: Output contains valid JSON with 'analysis' and 'config' sections
Config has at least 3 nodes: input/search, organize/analysis, output
Edges are sequential type connecting nodes in order
State schema includes input, intermediate, and output states

evals.name: conditional_retry_workflow
evals.prompt: 我需要自动化这个流程：先搜索数据，如果搜索成功就分析结果，如果失败就重试最多3次。分析完成后生成报告。
evals.expected_output: A configuration with search node, condition node for success/failure, loop mechanism for retry (max 3 times), analysis node, and report generation node

assertions.text: Contains conditional node with success/failure branches
Retry mechanism configured with max_retries = 3
Has control state for retry_count
Loop edge back to search node on failure

evals.name: parallel_multi_source_search
evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个工作流：同时从网页、数据库和文档库三个来源搜索资料，然后把结果合并，最后生成摘要。
evals.expected_output: A configuration with parallel search nodes (web, database, document), a merge node to combine results, and a summary generation node

assertions.text: Has 3 parallel search nodes (web, database, document)
Contains merge node to combine parallel results
Edges use parallel type for concurrent execution
Summary generation node after merge

evals.name: complex_approval_workflow
evals.prompt: 把这个任务步骤变成配置文件：用户提交申请 → 系统验证 → 如果验证失败返回错误 → 如果验证通过则发送给管理员审核 → 管理员批准则通过，拒绝则结束 → 通过后发送通知邮件
evals.expected_output: A complete workflow with input validation, conditional branches for success/failure, human approval node, and email notification

assertions.text: Contains human_approval node for admin review
Has validation node with success/failure branches
Email notification node after approval
Multiple conditional branches for different outcomes

evals.name: chinese_casual_speech
evals.prompt: 那个，我想做一个自动写报告的流程。首先呢，用户输入一个主题，然后系统去搜索相关的资料，搜完之后呢，把结果整理一下，然后让AI分析生成一个报告大纲。大纲生成之后，如果用户觉得不满意，可以让AI重新生成，最多重试3次。大纲确定后，再根据大纲写完整的报告内容。
evals.expected_output: A workflow handling casual Chinese speech with proper node identification, including human approval for outline review, retry logic (max 3), and content generation

assertions.text: Analysis section identifies filler words removal
Outline review has human approval node
Retry loop with max 3 attempts for outline regeneration
Final content generation node after approval
